originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Implementing V-Trace Advantage Estimation and Debugging CUDA Kernel in PufferLib
summary: Worked on implementing V-trace off-policy correction as a replacement for generalized advantage estimation in PufferLib. Debugged the CUDA kernel for V-trace, fixed indexing and clipping issues, and tested against PPO baseline; V-trace successfully implemented but off-policy replay not yet functional.
